MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Rothstein, via ZOOM, for MUFG Union Bank, Petitioner; Sarah Brooks, via ZOOM, for Elizabeth Cabrera, Objector; James Sutton, via ZOOM, in propria persona and for Takeshi Takenaka and John Sutton, Petitioners; John Rueppel, via ZOOM, for Valentin and Annelise Cabrera.

The court confirms receipt of the proposed order on the petition to approve settlement agreement and points counsel to the issue of not giving notice to the contingent beneficiaries. Mr. Rothstein points to his first supplement filed which addresses the preceding and that no contingent remainder beneficiaries who have property interest in the trust who will be impacted by the settlement agreement.

After additional discussion, the Case Management Hearing and Amended Petition to Invalidate Trust Instrument, etc., are taken off calendar. The Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez Not reported.

Petition For Order Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Denied

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Continued To Nov-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Rothstein and Danielle Diebert, via ZOOM, for MUFG Union Bank, N.A.; John Rueppel, via ZOOM, for Valentin Cabrera and Annelise Cabrera, Respondents; George Yamasaki, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Co-Trustee; James Sutton, via ZOOM, in propria persona Petitioner and for Takeshi Takenaka, Petitioner; Kevin Jackson, via ZOOM, for Elizabeth Cabrera, Objector.

The court begins by querying counsel regarding the status of settlement discussions. Mr. Sutton reports that the parties have a mediation scheduled with Bette Epstein on 10/21/2021. The court then turns to the Petition for Order Instructing Trustee and asks Mr. Rothstein regarding how the order would work if the court granted it. Mr. Rothstein provides oral testimony in support of his client's petition. Mr. Rothstein is advised that the court does not believe that an order is required to perform the Trustee's fiduciary duties. Mr. Jackson then requests that the court deny the Petition for Order Instructing Trustee.

After additional discussion, the Court advises the parties that it will be issuing a case management order. A case management hearing is set for the following dates at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204: 11/23/2021, 2/22/2022, and 4/26/2022. The trial is set for 7/05/2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Sutton is to monitor the Court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the order and serve it on all parties who are entitled to notice. The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust, etc., is continued to 11/23/2021, at 9:00 am Department 204. The Petition for Order Instructing Trustee is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Reporter: Donna Williams CSR: 11133 T: 415.602.6910 E: Donnawilliamscsr@gmail.com
